title: CSV export reader does not apply active snapshot filtering
what: The CSV export path reads all snapshot rows while the primary report path limits reads to the active snapshot.
current_task_relation: Discovered while changing report layout; export data selection is outside that requested work.
not_fixed_reason: The issue is outside scope and does not make the requested layout change unsafe or incorrect.

evidence.observation: The query contains no active snapshot predicate.

evidence.expected: Only rows from the active snapshot are exported.
evidence.observed: Rows from two snapshot IDs are returned.
evidence.observation: The fixture reproduces cross-snapshot export data.

recommended_next_step: Scope a focused export-reader correction with a regression test for active snapshot selection.
